shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Uruguay vs. Cape Verde in a Group H match in Miami, Fla. The only debuting nation to earn a point in its opener, Cape Verde and 40-year-old goalkeeper Vozinha (seven saves) try to follow up their historic 0-0 draw vs. mighty Spain. Uruguay poses quite the threat as well, but only got one (by Maxi Araujo) of its 10 shots on goal past Saudi Arabia in a 1-1 opening stalemate.
